## ASML Looks Inexpensive on Earnings Basis but Less So When Broader Demand Checks Are Applied

ASML is the critical enabler of leading-edge logic; if broader foundry demand checks are softening even as the earnings multiple looks attractive, it may signal the next EUV cycle upturn is further out than near-term screens imply—a positioning watch item for the lithography exposure on the watchlist.

- One outlet (Simply Wall St.) describes ASML as looking cheap on an earnings-based valuation screen.
- The same piece flags that broader demand and supply checks are less constructive for the stock.
- The tension—cheap on earnings, less so on broader checks—suggests near-term cycle caution even at an attractive multiple.
- Medium confidence; single-source, model-driven framing from one outlet.
